channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump puts Jay Clayton's nomination for intel chief on hold
item.description: President Trump delayed Jay Clayton's nomination to lead U.S. intelligence, saying he aims to force Congress to pass a voter ID bill...

item.title: Wahab advances in California special election for Swalwell's 14th Congressional District seat, CBS News projects
item.description: Voters in the San Francisco Bay Area are deciding who will fill the remainder of former Rep. Eric Swalwell's congressional seat in a special primary election.

item.title: Iran live updates: G7 leaders 'support,' 'ready to contribute' to US-Iran MOU
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Messi ties men's World Cup goals record with first World Cup hat trick
item.description: Lionel Messi tied the Men's World Cup goals record with his first World Cup hat trick as Argentina topped Algeria.
